IQUIPMENT
Personal Envlron Bag component in many survival kits_ the personal environ bag IS one-man shelter similar to the bubble tent. Commonly referred t0 as the body bag: this emergency shelter is Iiteral: Iy just large enough for one person to barely fit into and can keep that person alive in hostile environment, assuming the bag kept charged and enough food available.
Almost every industrialized world and certainly most mili- tary bases_ will also have wireless network connected to the wired network , giving people the ability to talk to just about any- one on the planet; However, characters might find that the com municators they buy on one world do not work with the network in place on another Most military units and many corporations use an inde pendent system for their communications The equipment can vary from simple radios which work only on line-of-sight basis to advanced models that combine laser, microwave and low--fre quency transceivers Many of these communicators use some form of encryption scrambling to help ensure that even their enemies intercept their transmissions_ the data cannot be decoded_
Climbing /Rappelllng Klt The contains one hundred meters of   high-tensile strength cord; harness_ ascenders ad descenders pitons_ hand and foot spikes and other minor components These kits must be replenished (pitons are left behind spikes are worn down and so on) after each use for 15 C bills: Any equipped character making Climbing Action Check applies 2 Modifier Excellent Equipment on Hand) to the target number:
Civillan Equipment Civilian communications equipment is cheap and readily avail: able on most modern worlds  However; cannot interface with the advanced systems used by military and corporate agencies Civlllan Communicator: Pocket-sized ad relatively inex- pensive civilian communicators are standard They transmit only on the radio spectrum and for the most part they are only capable of voice transmissions Some exorbitantly priced mod els do_ however, have camera and vid-screen built in and are available for five times the cost; These normally make use of public   communications network: Alternatively; members group communicate directly with one another by   simply choosing different   setting   forgoing use the comm net entirely: Use this mode limited to range of only ten kilo meters Clvlllan Mlcrocommunlcator: These operate the same as the civilian communicator, except they are much smaller. Most are easily concealed buttons clothing worn as jewelry: None has the capacity to receive video, though some do have built-in cameras used outside comm network, they only have range two kilometers, Standard VId-Phone: Nearly every home ad office has at least one video phone
Electronlc Compass The compass perhaps one of the most important pieces of equipment both the infantryman ad outdoorsman_ worlds without any modern navigation or communications satel: lites place the compass will point in known direction based the magnetic poles_ As long as fairly detailed map avail: able the compass user will be able to navigate. If electronic beacons are place_ the electronic compass will also tell its user exact planetary coordinates_ Characters with compass can use the Navigation Skill without suffering Lack of Proper Equipment' Modifier. If detailed maps are also available; the gamemaster   might apply Excellent   Equipment Hand Modifier.
Emergency Rations Emergency rations conie few   different   styles_ The cheapest and smallest are supplement pills which provide for all of the nutritiona needs of the average person but do little sate tne appetite_ More expensive but also far bulkier, are indi- vidual ration packets. These contain entire preserved meals either   dehydrated or  hermetically   sealed tnat can be  con- sumed right out of the package or heated and served in more civilized fashion_ No matter the style_ while emergency rations are enough to sustain soldiers ad others in the field_ tney are universally hated and are shunned any sort 0f real" food is available_
Advanced Equlpment More expensive than the commonly available civilian equip ment; but also much more secure: these pieces of advanced communications equipment provide the necessary Iink between soldiers and their commanders _ Mllltary Comm Icator: The personal communicator issued t0 just about every soldier and police officer. is capa ble transmitting scrambled signal multitude of quencies and can be hand-held built into soldier'$ helmet. The range is ten kilometers even outside Iocal comm net. Common accessories include remote earphones and Micro phones. Milltary Mlcrocommunlcator: Microcommunicators are tiny transceivers commonly used Dy anyone who wants t0 maintain low profile_ They can be concealed just about any type clothing even hidden person' ear; Military microcom-
TOOLs AND GEAR Every MW3 character needs more than just weapons and first-aid kit. Many of the items characters wile use are covered this section;
COMMUNICATIONB myriad of  different communications systems found across the thousands of inhabited systems of the galaxy; each filling different niche Satellites or orbiting spacecraft relay transmissions to isolated locations and Iink the planet to other settlements throughout the system:
